description: Identical setup to order-status-basic but with an explicit empty CustomerMemory blob. Asserts that an empty memory record yields the same quick-reply plan as the baseline - the 'no regression when memory is empty' gate.

messages.contentText: Hi, where is my order #1001? It's been a few days.

instruction: Reply to the customer about their order.

checks.description: Reply does not invent prior customer history when customerMemory is empty. The agent must not reference past orders, prior interactions, VIP/loyalty status, or any relationship facts that are not present in customerMemory or recentMessages. Treating the customer as new (or making no relationship claims at all) is correct.
